idea.title: Spaghetti Monster
idea.hook: Your noodle arms are REAL physics: verlet spaghetti strands that trail, wiggle and auto-slurp every scrap of street food they brush, and you visibly grow every few seconds.
idea.prototype: One-thumb-drag eat-and-grow arena. A meatball-core monster with N verlet spaghetti tentacles swims a scrolling market plaza; strands auto-slurp food (which slides down the noodle into the mouth), size tiers add tentacles + core size + new food + new threat, and chefs snip your noodles with scissors. Total noodle length IS your health; run it out and it's game over. Persistent sauce points buy permanent upgrades.
idea.why_novel: The differentiator is soft-body noodle PHYSICS as the core verb: instead of a rigid body that swallows things, your reach is a fan of wiggly verlet strands that wrap and slurp, and those same strands are your health bar that chefs actively hunt and cut. Growth is legible and tactile (segments visibly appear), and the threat chases the noodles, not the core.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Total live noodle-segment count (noodleLength) is a depleting health resource: chef scissors shave segments, fork traps pin a strand so you cannot retract, and hitting the LENGTH_MIN floor ends the run. No countdown anywhere.
idea.lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' when noodleLength <= LENGTH_MIN (8). A monster that never steers to eat is cut to the floor by the ever-present scissor chef in ~11s; steering to eat outgrows one chef.

sources.title: hole.io
sources.snippet: Genre reference for the eat-and-grow arena loop: absorb the map, grow, tiers open up. Structure copied (first-10s clarity, grow-tiers, endless high score), not IP/art.

sources.title: snake.io
sources.snippet: Reference for the one-thumb steering + trailing body + get-longer growth feel; Spaghetti Monster swaps the rigid tail for verlet noodle arms and makes length the health bar.

sources.title: Grow A Garden | Growden.io / Piece of Cake: Merge and Bake / Match Arena
sources.snippet: Live teardown refs (2026-07-03): land in gameplay <10s, core verb -> instant satisfying feedback -> richer next beat -> currency/progress drip that funds the next step; big-hero thumbnail; meta ladder always one step ahead.

synthesizer_brief: Manual request from Tim on 2026-07-03: build a 'spaghetti monster game'. Interpreted as an eat-and-grow arena (hole.io / snake lineage) differentiated by soft-body verlet noodle physics, mobile-portrait-first, comic no-gore chefs, persistent sauce-point meta upgrades.

alternatives.title: Noodle Fishing
alternatives.hook: Cast a single long spaghetti strand like a fishing line to hook and reel street food, timing tension so the noodle doesn't snap.
alternatives.why_novel: Turns the noodle into a precision reel-in tool instead of an arena limb; single-strand skill rather than a growing fan.

alternatives.title: Pasta Tower
alternatives.hook: Stack wobbling meatballs and noodle nests into a swaying tower before the soft-body pile topples.
alternatives.why_novel: Uses soft-body pasta for a vertical balance game rather than a horizontal arena; failure is a topple, not a snip.

alternatives.title: Meatball Merge
alternatives.hook: Drop and merge meatballs down a saucy board; equal balls fuse into bigger ones up the food tiers.
alternatives.why_novel: A merge-economy take on the food theme; management pacing instead of reflex steering.

alternatives.title: Chef Escape
alternatives.hook: A lone meatball rolls and dodges down an endless kitchen conveyor of blades, graters and boiling pots.
alternatives.why_novel: Pure evasion runner with no growth mechanic; the chefs become the whole level rather than roaming threats.
